docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $485.00 SERVED DEC-08-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GILL, ELISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $560.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,560.00, INCLUDED INTHEJUDGMENTARE STTUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $4000.00 AWARDED DUE TO THE DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY GILL, ELISE AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
